languages.title: ndinga
languages.subtitle: Pona ndinga yina bo ke sadilaka na application ya mvimba.
languages.noResults: Ata ndinga mosi ve ke wakana ti mambu ya nge ke sosa.

phone.label: nimero ya telefone
phone.searchCountry: Sosa insi, kode, to prefixe ya kubinga
phone.noCountries: Ata nsi mosi ve ke wakana ti mambu ya nge ke sosa.
phone.tooShort: Nimero yayi ya telefone kele nkufi mingi.
phone.tooLong: Nimero yai ya telefone kele nda mingi.
phone.invalid: Sonika nimero ya telefone ya mbote sambu na insi ya nge me pona.
phone.valid: nimero ya telefone ya bansi mingi

auth.onboardingTagline: Nkundi ya lutaninu ya muntu yandi mosi sambu na bantangu yina kele na kati ya “mono kele mbote” ti “mono kele na mfunu ya lusadisu.”
auth.createSubtitle: Pona mutindu ya kukota sambu na kutanina graf na nge ya lutaninu.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Beto lendaka ve kumanisa kukota. Tala connexion na nge mpi meka diaka.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kusadila kilumbu ya kutunga kisika. Native Google Kukota ke salaka na kutunga ya kutunga.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair ntangu yai to landa mpi yika yo na nima.
auth.northStarBody: E VL01 wearable ilenda tezanesa e fulu ya lutaninu ye nsongo ye sinsu yandá ya niema.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Nkundi na nge ya mawete ya lutaninu na karte mpi na ba appel.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear lenda sadisa na mutindu ya nzo, mutindu ya nkengidi, mutindu ya urgence, kubinga sambu na kupesa bikuma, mpi lusadisu ya ndinga.
auth.remindersReady: Bangibusa ya mawete kele ya kuyilama.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Sadila sambu na karte, bisika ya kigonsa, kukuma na lutaninu, mpi SOS contexte.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ke lomba kisika sambu bankengidi kubakisa kisika lusadisu lenda vanda na mfunu. Nge lenda soba yo na nima na Parametre.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Bansangu ke sadisaka na kukota mpi na mambu ya nswalu.
permissions.notificationsBody: Beto ke sadilaka kaka bansangu sambu na bansangu ya lutaninu, bansangu ya mpa ya nswalu, mpi bangibusa yina nge ke pesaka nzila.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Kisika ke salaka nde mambu ya lutaninu kuvanda ya siki-siki
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ke sadila kisika na nge sambu na karte ya lutaninu, bisika ya kigonsa, kukabula nswalu, mpi SOS contexte. Nge lenda soba yo na nima na Parametre.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Balukebisu ya lutaninu kele na mfunu ya bansangu
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ke tindaka bangibusa ya kukota, bansangu ya mpa ya nswalu, mpi bansangu ya lutaninu yina nge ke pesa nzila. Beto ke sadilaka ve bansangu sambu na bapiblisite.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Microphone ke pesaka ngolo na kubinga bantu na lutaninu
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ke sadilaka mikro na nge kaka ntangu nge ke yantika AI nduku to kubinga ya lutaninu.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth ke vukisaka bima na nge ya kulwata
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ke sadilaka Bluetooth sambu na kuvukisa ti bima ya mayaka NorthStar, kutanga kisika ya nguizani, mpi kubasisa ba nzila ya lutaninu yina ke katukaka na kima ya kulwata.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ke sadilaka kamera kaka ntangu nge ke ponaka kubaka foto ya profil to kukabula kifwanisu ya lutaninu.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ke bumbaka nzila yai na Parametre mpi na tablo ya ordinatere.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pona ndinga ya nduku yina ke monana mbote na kuwa.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kutala pima sambu na lutaninu ya konso kilumbu.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Kabula contexte na bantu ya nge ke tudilaka ntima.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Bapompi tanu lenda tombuka tii na SOS mpi balukebisu ya bankengidi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Sala kikuma ya mbote ya kubika mambu ya kukonda kiese.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Yantika kubinga nduku na ntangu ya kieleka ntangu nge kele na mfunu ya lusadisu.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Meka ba nzila ya lutaninu na demo ya pression ya fioti.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Lunda bima ya mayaka pene-pene ntangu nge ke sala scanner.
jewelry.noDevices: Ata kima mosi ve ya pene-pene ya NorthStar me monana ntete.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ya kutala lenda yantika ve. Meka diaka.
jewelry.scanFailed: Beto monaka ve bima ya mayaka pene-pene. Tala Bluetooth, bumba NorthStar pene-pene, mpi meka diaka.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ya kutala lenda yantika ve. Tala Bluetooth ya kukota mpi meka diaka.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Kukota na apareyi ya pene-pene me kangama. Bika Bluetooth kukota na Parametre, na nima meka diaka.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar bakaka ntangu mingi sambu na kukangama. Pusa yo pene-pene mpi meka diaka.
jewelry.connectFailed: Beto lendaka ve kukangama na NorthStar. Tala kana yo kele ti charge mpi kana yo kele pene-pene, na nima meka diaka.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Ata apareyi mosi ve ya pene-pene
jewelry.emptyMessage: Lunda NorthStar ya kufuluka mpi pene-pene ya telefone yai, na nima sala scanner diaka.

home.subtitle: Tablo ya nduku ya lutaninu
home.readyBody: Ndinga, karte, mayaka, mpi bankengidi kele na kitamina ya robinet mosi.
home.noDevice: Ata apareyi mosi ve me vukana

map.title: Mukanda ya lutaninu
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go nsangu ya ntete; Mapbox ke monisa na kutunga ya kutunga.
map.updateFailed: Beto lendaka ve kuyidika kisika na nge. Meka diaka.
map.notRequested: Kukota na kisika me lombama ve. Nge lenda kangula yo na nima na nsadisa ya Parametre.
map.permissionOff: Kukota na kisika me kangama. Kangula yo na Parametre sambu na kutula karte ya lutaninu na kati-kati na nge.
map.timeout: Kisika na nge ke baka ntangu mingi kuluta mutindu nge vandaka kuyindula. Katuka kisika mosi ya kele ti kidimbu ya pwelele mpi meka diaka.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Bisika ya bo me bumbaka ntete ve
map.savedEmptyMessage: Bisika ya nge ke tudilaka ntima yina nge ke bumbaka ta monana awa sambu na kukota nswalu.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.offlineCompanion: Nkundi ya kele ve na nzila
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Kukangama mbote na nduku na nge ya ndinga...
safetyCall.useOffline: Sadila nduku yina kele ve na nzila
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Disolo na nge ke yantika awa
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Yantika kubinga to sonika nsangu kana nge me yilama.

history.clearMessage: Yau ke katula bansangu ya nduku ya AI ya bo me bumba na kisadilu yai.
history.title: Disolo ya masolo
history.subtitle: AI nsangu ya nduku ya bo me bumba na kisadilu yai.
history.empty: Ata masolo mosi ve me bumbana.
history.emptyMessage: Masolo na nge ya nduku AI ta monana awa na nima ya kubinga na nge ya ntete.
history.loadFailed: Beto lendaka ve kutula disolo ya masolo. Meka diaka.
history.clearFailed: Beto lendaka ve kukatula disolo ya masolo. Meka diaka.
history.deleteFailed: Beto lendaka ve kufwa disolo yina. Meka diaka.

voices.title: Ndinga na mono ya kubinga sambu na lutaninu
voices.subtitle: Pona ndinga ya nduku yina nge ke mona nde yo me fwana na kuwa.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: E mbandu yayi ya ndinga lendaka kubula ve. Meka diaka.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Sadila bamvutu ya banduku ya kimvuka ntangu réseau to Hume ya kuzaba kele ve.
settings.privacyBody: Basisa to kufwa bansangu ya bwala yina bo me bumba na apareyi yai.
settings.emergencyContacts: Bantu ya nge lenda kutana ti bo na kintulumukina
settings.exportFailedMessage: Kukonda kubasisa bansangu na nge sesepi yai.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Yau ke katula profil na nge, ba parametre, ba contacts ya urgence, histoire ya masolo, ba ngibusa ya nswa, mpe session ya auth local na apareyi yayi.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Kukonda kufwa bansangu ya bwala sesepi yai.

sections.languageSubtitle: Ndinga ya nswa ya interface mpi ya ngidika
sections.companionSubtitle: Mambu ya nge ke zolaka na ndinga mpi na nganda ya Internet
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, bankengidi, mpi bantu yina bo lenda solula ti bo na kintulumukina
sections.accountSubtitle: Kilumbu na nge ya sesepi VeryLoving

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ke tulendi lunda luzolo lwalu ko. Meka diaka.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Kitini na nge kele kaka na kisalu. Meka diaka.

contacts.title: Bantu ya nge lenda kutana ti bo na kintulumukina
contacts.subtitle: Bantu ya bo ke tudilaka ntima yina kele na ntangu ya baflux ya lutaninu.
contacts.name: Zina
contacts.namePlaceholder: Zina ya muntu ya nge ke solula ti yandi
contacts.empty: Ba nsangu ya urgence me yikama ntete ve.
contacts.emptyTitle: Ata muntu mosi ve ya urgence
contacts.emptyMessage: Yika muntu ya nge ke tudilaka ntima sambu yandi vanda ya kuyilama ntangu nzila ya lutaninu kele na mfunu na yandi.
contacts.removeMessage: Muntu yayi ke monana diaka ve na nzila ya urgence na nge.
contacts.nameRequired: Sonika zina ya muntu yina nge ke solula ti yandi.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Beto lendaka ve kubumba nsangu yai. Tala mambu ya fioti-fioti mpi meka diaka.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Beto lendaka ve kukatula nsangu yai. Meka diaka.

device.title: Kusadila bisadilu
device.subtitle: Landa kisadilu na nge ya NorthStar.
device.none: Ata apareyi mosi ve me vukana

friends.title: Banduku
friends.subtitle: Bakengidi, balomba, na graf ya urgence.
friends.emptyTitle: Kitini na nge ya lutaninu kele mpamba
friends.emptyMessage: Banduku ti bankengidi ya bo ke tudilaka ntima ta monana awa kana bo me yika bo.

emergency.title: Nswalu SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kutombula kaka kana nge kele na mfunu ya lusadisu nswalu.
emergency.body: Yau ta zabisa nzila na nge ya lutaninu mpi ta yidika bantu yina nge ta kutana ti bo na kintulumukina.
emergency.notificationBody: Flux ya urgence na nge me yilama.
emergency.addContact: Yika muntu ya nge lenda solula ti yandi na mbala mosi na Parametre.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Kisika ya kukabula stub me yilama. Kukangama na nsuka ya kukabula backend sambu na kutinda ba lien en direct.

quickShare.title: Kukabula nswalu
quickShare.subtitle: Flux ya kukabula kisika me yilama.

capybearTap.title: Capybear
capybearTap.subtitle: Fina mbala zole na NorthStar na nge sambu na kulosa nsinga ya lutaninu.
capybearTap.body: Nzila ya bidimbu kele ya kuyilama sambu na bansinga ya mambu ya BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Nge ke monana nde nge kele ve na nzila. Nsangu na nge ta tindama ntangu nge ta vukana diaka.
errors.voiceQueued: Nsangu me bumbana. Yo ta tindama ntangu nduku ya ndinga ta vukisa diaka.
errors.voiceRetrying: Kumeka kutinda diaka nsangu na nge...
errors.voiceConnecting: Kukangama mbote na nduku na nge ya ndinga...
errors.microphone: Kusadila mikro kele mfunu sambu na kubinga bantu na ndinga. Nge lenda kangula yo na Parametre, to kusonika nsangu na kisika na yo.
errors.billing: Nkundi ya ndinga ya internet kele ve sambu na mwa ntangu. Nge lenda landa ti nduku yina kele ve na Internet.
errors.authentication: Nkundi ya ndinga lendaka ve kuzikisa lukutakanu yai. Kota diaka to sadila nduku yina kele ve na Internet sambu na ntangu yai.
errors.timeout: Nkundi ya ndinga bakaka ntangu mingi sambu na kupesa mvutu. Tala connexion na nge mpi meka diaka.
errors.network: Beto lendaka ve kukutana ti nduku ya ndinga. Tala connexion na nge, na nima meka diaka to landa kukonda internet.
errors.genericVoice: Kima mosi me zenga ndinga ya kubinga. Meka diaka, to landa ti nduku yina kele ve na Internet.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving kele na mfunu ya kukota na mikro sambu na lutaninu mpi AI kubinga ya banduku.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving ke sadilaka kisika na nge sambu na karte ya lutaninu mpi bima ya lutaninu yina kele pene-pene.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ke sadilaka Bluetooth sambu na kukangama na bima na nge ya lutaninu ya NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Mayele yayi ya kukota kele ve na version yayi.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Kwenda na demo (sambu na développement kaka)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mode demo kesadilaka kaka ba-donnée ya luvunu yina kele na appareil. Ba-service ya kukangama me authentifier ve, mpi session yayi kevutuka na luyantiku ntangu application kecharge diaka.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Code ya vérification kele mbi to ntangu na yo mefwa. Lomba code ya mpa mpi meka diaka.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Kukota memekama mbala mingi. Vingila mwa ntangu, na nima meka diaka.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Vérification ya kukota mebakaka ntangu mingi. Tala connexion na nge mpi meka diaka.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Beto mekokaka ve kukuma na service ya kukota. Tala connexion na nge mpi meka diaka.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Ntangu ya session na nge mefwa. Kota diaka.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Carte ya lutaninu mekokaka ve kucharge. Tala connexion na nge mpi meka diaka.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Kisika ya ntangu yayi kele ve. Beto kesonga kisika na nge ya nsuka yina bo bumbaka na %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Beto mekokaka ve kukabula kisika na nge. Tala nswa ya kisika mpi meka diaka.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Tala kisika na mono yina bo sonikaka na %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Tala kisika na mono ya nsuka yina bo bumbaka mpi sonikaka na %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Nswa ya Bluetooth kele ya kukanga. Kangula yo na Settings, na nima meka diaka.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth kele ya kukanga. Kangula yo, na nima meka diaka.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kukangisa na Bluetooth kele ve na appareil to version yayi.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Beto mekokaka ve kumona NorthStar. Bika yo pene, tala Bluetooth, mpi meka diaka.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Appareil ya NorthStar mosi ve memonana pene. Bika yo pene mpi sosa diaka.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Beto mekokaka ve kukangama na NorthStar. Bika yo na charge mpi pene, na nima meka diaka.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Beto mekokaka ve kubumba kisika yayi. Meka diaka.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Clavier ya téléphone mekangukaka; appel mendimama ve.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Contact ya urgence vandaka ve; appel mosi ve mesalamaka.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Clavier ya téléphone mekokaka ve kukanguka; appel mosi ve mesalamaka.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Bo mekokaka ve kundima kumeka SOS ya nsuka.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Compagnon ya ndinga kele ve ntangu yayi. Meka diaka na nima to landa na compagnon yina kesalaka offline.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
